Sender: The Director General of the Antiquities Service
Recipient: Monsieur E. Baraize, Director of Works of the Antiquities Service, at the Pyramids
Excavation_Site: Tomb of Seti I in the Valley of the Kings
Brief_Summary: The Director General informs E. Baraize that a small fragment of a wall in Seti I's tomb in the Valley of the Kings has fallen due to an old crack. Baraize is requested to reattach the fragment during his next visit to Luxor.
English_Translation:
SERVICE OF ANTIQUITIES.
GENERAL DIRECTION.

N° 5-3/1

Attached documents

(FORM No. 1533, F.C.) Cairo, December 17, 1925

Subject:

Mr. Director of Works,

[Handwritten Arabic: ح] Our Chief Inspector of Upper Egypt has just informed us that a small fragment of the wall of the last room of the tomb of Seti I in the Valley of the Kings has fallen. It appears that this fall was accidental, due to the existence of an old crack trace to which fine dust had adhered. Furthermore, the debris has been collected. [Handwritten Arabic: ١٢/١]

I ask you, when you go to Luxor, to put the wall fragment in question back in place.

Please accept, Mr. Director of Works, the assurance of my distinguished consideration.

For THE DIRECTOR GENERAL,
L.L. Empr
[Handwritten Arabic: The Director General]

Mr. E. Baraize
Director of Works
of the Antiquities Service
At the Pyramids
[Handwritten Arabic: ١٢/١]
Stamps_and_Annotations: Handwritten '1' added to reference number N° 5-3/
Full_Transcription:
SERVICE DES ANTIQUITÉS.
DIRECTION GÉNÉRALE.

             N° 5-3/[Handwritten: 1]

Pièces jointes

                                          (FORM No. 1533, F.C.) Le Caire, le 17 Décembre 1925

Objet:

Monsieur le Directeur de Travaux,

[Handwritten Arabic: ح] Notre Inspecteur en Chef de la Haute-Egypte
vient de nous faire savoir qu'un petit fragment
du mur de la dernière salle de la tombe de Séti I
à la vallée des Rois est tombé. Il paraît, a-
t-il, que cette chute a été fortuite, à cause de
l'existence de la trace d'une lézarde ancienne à
laquelle s'est attachée la poussière fine. D'ail-
leurs les débris ont été recueillis. [Handwritten Arabic: ١٢/١]

Je vous prie, quand vous irez à Louxor, de
remettre en place le fragment de mur en question.

Veuillez agréer, Monsieur le Directeur de
travaux, l'assurance de ma considération distinguée.

                                          Pr. LE DIRECTEUR GENERAL,
                                          L.L. Empr
                                          [Handwritten Arabic: المدير العام]

Monsieur E.Baraize
Directeur de travaux
du Service des Antiquités
Aux Pyramides
                                                                [Handwritten Arabic: ١٢/١]
